title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb analyzes AutoResearch from Andrej Karpathy as an early demonstration of iterative self-improvement applied to software development. The video examines how this approach offers a new perspective on software improvement while noting that its applicability is not universal across all use cases.
